name: Claim for work back pain denied, what now?
description: Appeal to commission hearing ASAP—many wins on review[1].

mainEntity.name: Claim for work back pain denied, what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal to commission hearing ASAP—many wins on review[1].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Appeal within deadlines: request hearing before ALJ in Utah Labor Commission or Idaho Industrial Commission.** Wins include back pay + interest[1]. **Key factors:** New medical evidence, causation proof, employer prejudice. **Practical guidance:** Hire attorney experienced in hearings, gather more docs, attend mediation. 2-level appeals possible[1][3]. **Don't miss appeal window.**
